CustomField.description: The Status picklist value assigned to a Recurring Donation when it is automatically marked as lapsed by Status Automation after the configured number of days without expected donations. Must match an existing Status picklist value. Works with the Status Automation Days for Lapsed setting. Requires Enhanced Recurring Donations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Status value for Recurring Donations automatically marked as lapsed by Status Automation. Must match an existing Status picklist value.
CustomField.label: Status Automation Lapsed Value
